verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Holy Spirit flow through me Holy Spirit flow through me And make my life What it ought to be Holy Spirit flow through me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Holy Spirit rest on me Holy Spirit rest on me And use me Lord To win the lost to Thee Holy Spirit rest on me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Holy Spirit flow out from me Holy Spirit flow out from me That others Lord may see You in me Holy Spirit flow out from me
